description_en: Washington may not be a Muslim-majority destination, but it welcomes Muslim travelers with real halal options. You'll find 90 halal restaurants and 11 mosques nearby, plus real-time prayer times and the Qibla direction — everything to explore Washington, the United States, with peace of mind.
metaDescription_en: Halal guide to Washington: 90+ halal restaurants, 11 mosques, prayer times and tips for Muslim travelers. Halal Trust Score 3.7/5.
